posts.author: jpelrman87 (Josh Perlman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I want to be able to take a widget or widgets from a board or an entire board and get an embed code so I can embed that widget, widget, or dashboard in a website

What are you trying to achieve

Ability to share dashboard or info from a dashboard within our intranet system
